violations.text: The ice machine drainpipes are lacking an air gap (currently equipped with an air break). The drainpipes are to be shortened/adjusted so the ends are not below the floor rim of the floor drainpipe and to prevent possible contamination between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed (Ice Machine). New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
Areas of the tile and tile grout in the back prep area is in poor repair (worn/thinning/cracking). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Areas of the facility were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris under and behind equipment. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2026

The dish washing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Per the PIC, a hand sink is ordered and due to be installed. PIC is to contact inspector when hand sink is installed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

Areas of the tile and tile grout in the back prep area are in poor repair (worn/thinning/cracking). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. (At the time of re-inspection, the tile floor and grout lines were observed to be in the process of being repaired.) New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The dish washing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Per the PIC at the time of inspection, if needed, hands are washed in the bathroom when working in the dish/prep area. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

A scoop with a handle was observed stored with the handle in the food (Sugar). Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Scoop was adjusted at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

The non-food-contact surfaces of the refrigeration gaskets, shelving, and other internal surfaces were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2024
Areas of the tile and tile grout in the back prep area is in poor repair (worn/thinning/cracking). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
